title: College admissions (Yahir, 2020–2021)
html:
College admissions (Yahir, 2020–2021)

The HS-senior application + scholarship-stack assembly process — Sept 2020 through ~Jul 2021. The single most operationally documented chapter of the pre-Austin Yahir, with todos, essay drafts, scholarship-tracking spreadsheets, mentor-routing notes, and recurring "why OSU?" essay rewrites all preserved.

TL;DR

  • Spans OSU (the destination) and University of Oregon (alternate path, applied Jan 14 2021)
  • The funding stack: Renaissance, Ford Family Foundation, Al Forthan, JCEF, IDA — Oregon-state-anchored
  • Mentor pipeline: Diana Hoff (Renaissance), Brenda Aguilera (school counselor / IDA), jann (Ford track), Rudy Sanchez (scholarships)
  • The debt of gratitude thread is born here — every dollar stacked is logged with the person who unlocked it

Chronology

  • 2018-10-23 — 2018 10 23 page 7 letter 11 and 14 forgot a in personal and r in our — earliest precursor (sophomore essay editing)
  • 2019-08-25 — 2019 08 25 finish letters — letter-writing prep
  • 2020-05-09 — 2020 05 09 distinguishing your self doesnt mean getting ahead bringing — distinguishing-self meta-frame
  • 2020-12-04 — 2020 12 04 national scholarships december 2020 — national scholarships scan
  • 2020-12-12 — 2020 12 12 brenda ida osu essay todos — IDA + OSU essays via Brenda
  • 2020-12-23 — 2020 12 23 core questions to answer for essays — essay scaffolding
  • 2021-01-12 — 2021 01 12 fhs final — final HS-finals push
  • 2021-01-14 — 2021 01 14 meditate todo dump — UO app submitted
  • 2021-04-09 — 2021 04 09 rudy sanchez scolarships — Rudy scholarship channel
  • 2021-04-10 — 2021 04 10 ford osu prep todos — Ford + OSU prep
  • 2021-04-19 — 2021 04 19 why osu — the "why OSU" essay
  • 2021-05-06 — 2021 05 06 230 zoom interview — scholarship interview
  • 2021-05-26 — 2021 05 26 change graduation change — graduation pivot
  • 2022-02-05 — 2022 02 05 Al Forthan Email — Al Forthan thank-you (post-acceptance)

Why it matters

This is the prequel to every later Yahir-as-operator pattern:

  • The mentor-routing reflex () gets formalized here
  • no runway discipline is born of stitching together $X from Y sources because there is no parental funding line
  • debt of gratitude becomes a permanent operating principle (every Forthan / Renaissance / Ford dollar is owed back somehow)
  • The why-OSU rewrite obsession is the same reflex Yahir later applies to the brotein App Store description and the rankett elevator pitch — write the reason a stranger should believe in you, then rewrite it 12 more times

Connections

debt of gratitude · jann · diana hoff · brenda aguilera · rudy sanchez · osu · oregon · renaissance scholarship · ford family foundation · al forthan · jcef · ida individual development account · no runway discipline · yebw
